member.name: T:StruttonTechnologies.Core.Identity.Coordinator.Contracts.Authentication.IAuthenticationCoordinator
member.summary: Defines the authentication coordination contract for registration, sign-in, and sign-out flows.

member.name: T:StruttonTechnologies.Core.Identity.Coordinator.Contracts.Authorization.IAuthorizationCoordinator
member.summary: Defines the authorization coordination contract for claims-based identity retrieval.

member.name: M:StruttonTechnologies.Core.Identity.Coordinator.Contracts.Authorization.IAuthorizationCoordinator.GetClaimsPrincipalAsync(System.String)
member.summary: Gets the claims principal projection for the specified user.

member.name: T:StruttonTechnologies.Core.Identity.Coordinator.Contracts.Users.IUserCoordinator
member.summary: Defines user coordination operations used by the API layer.

member.name: M:StruttonTechnologies.Core.Identity.Coordinator.Contracts.Users.IUserCoordinator.GetClaimsPrincipalAsync(System.String)
member.summary: Gets the claims principal projection for the specified user.

member.name: M:StruttonTechnologies.Core.Identity.Coordinator.Contracts.Users.IUserCoordinator.GetNormalizedEmailAsync(System.String)
member.summary: Gets the normalized email for the specified user.

member.name: M:StruttonTechnologies.Core.Identity.Coordinator.Contracts.Users.IUserCoordinator.GetUserRolesAsync(System.String)
member.summary: Gets the role names assigned to the specified user.

member.name: M:StruttonTechnologies.Core.Identity.Coordinator.Contracts.Users.IUserCoordinator.GetUserProfileAsync(System.String)
member.summary: Gets the user profile for the specified user.
